footnotes.text: Fugitive slaves and criminals were often branded on the forehead. 3-5: St. Paul condemns abstinence when it is the result of the false principle that matter is bad because produced by the evil spirit. From right motives of self-denial and mortification, and as commanded by the Church, the practice of fast and abstinence is good.
Thy youth: St. Timothy would be about thirty-five years old at this time.
